---
title: "Ammonyte"
subtitle: "A Python package for multi-method detection of transitions in paleoclimate time series"
sidebar: Ammonyte
---

A Python package for multi-method detection of transitions in paleoclimate time series

## Quick install

```bash
pip install git+https://github.com/LinkedEarth/Ammonyte.git
```

## Where to go next

| | |
|---|---|
| [Get Started](get-started/installation.qmd) | Install the package and run your first example |
| [Tutorials](tutorials/index.qmd) | Worked examples |
| [Reference](api/index.qmd) | Full API documentation for every class and function |
